calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff: Liana Tahir, not present, but represented in court by her agent: Jimmy Budihalim.
Defendant: Rito Castellanos, present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissed with prejudice.
Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the property located at 1068 Howard St., #4, San Francisco.
Defendant can remain in possession until 5 P.M. Aug. 8, 2007, and vacate under broom clean condition, any property left in the unit will be disposed by Plaintiff, and return all keys to the property manager.
Plaintiff waived back rent for month of June and 8 days rent for Aug., parties agreed to split the rent of $795.00 for the month of July, due on July 15th.
Defendant waived all claims, security deposit pursuant to ccp 1950.5, each to bear own fees and costs.
If Defendant complied, plaintiffs waived all back rents, and matter will be dismissed with prejudice,
If failed, upon one day notice to the Defendant, Plaintiff is entitled to a Ex Parte application for Judgment pursuant to stipulation, attorney's fees and costs.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
